creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port was updated only hours before you've tried to fetch the distfile. It usually takes a while for the distcache mirrors to propagate newly added files. I've just confirmed that the distfile is now properly mirrored.

The upstream ftp site is known to be quite reliable. It could be that your firewall is blocking ftp requests. 

There is nothing wrong with using ftp master sites. If available it is good practice to have a mix of different protocols (HTTP, HTTPS, FTP) for people behind overzealous proxies and firewalls.

The HTTP link you've mentioned is not suitable for distfile fetching as the file is not versioned.
